result.finding: No explicit container CPU or memory resource limits configured in docker-compose.yml. JVM heap is bounded by JAVA_OPTS (-Xmx512m -Xms256m) in the Dockerfile, but no Docker-level resource constraints are set. README recommends allocating at least 4GB memory to Docker Desktop for Oracle DB.
evidence: docker-compose.yml: no 'deploy.resources' section found for either service
Dockerfile: ENV JAVA_OPTS='-Xmx512m -Xms256m' (JVM-level constraint only, not Docker resource limit)
No Kubernetes resource requests/limits (no K8s manifests present)
README.md mentions 'Increase Docker memory allocation to at least 4GB' as troubleshooting advice for Oracle DB
values: CPU limits: not configured (no Docker or K8s limits)
Memory limits: not configured at container level
Recommended host Docker memory: 4GB+ (for Oracle DB)
